# Casting Karma LLC

> Casting Karma LLC builds and operates real AI-automated businesses — and offers that same capability as a service: done-with-you AI implementation, automation, AI agents, and custom software. AI wired into how a business actually runs, not slideware.

> Last updated: 2026-07-23. Location: Texas, United States (serving the US, remotely). Contact: contact@castingkarmallc.com.

## Company
- Name: Casting Karma LLC
- Website: https://castingkarmallc.com
- Contact: contact@castingkarmallc.com
- Location: Texas, United States (serving clients across the US, remote)
- Type: Independent technology company / multi-product software studio
- Tagline: Good energy in · Good energy out

## What we offer (AI implementation services)
- **Ops automation** — Take a workflow done by hand today (follow-ups, reporting, data entry, reminders) and turn it into a running system that does it for you, on schedule.
- **AI agent & workflow setup** — Task-scoped AI agents inside your existing tools that draft, sort, route, summarize, and act, with guardrails and a human check where it matters.
- **Connector & data wiring** — Connect the apps you already use (email, CRM, spreadsheets, storage, billing) so data flows without copy-paste and numbers live in one place.
- **Internal AI enablement** — Set your team up with AI workflows and practical guardrails that fit how they actually work, so the capability stays after the engagement.
- **Custom software development** — A focused web app or internal tool designed and built around how your team actually works.
- **AI consulting** — Not sure where AI fits? We map the highest-leverage places to start.

Engagements are fixed-scope and framed around the outcome — not open-ended retainers.

## Why Casting Karma
Casting Karma is not a consultancy that read about AI — it runs a multi-product software studio on it. The operation is coordinated by specialized AI agents working from shared living documents, connected tools, and scheduled automations. Products span several industries (marine, aviation, agriculture, logistics). The same playbook we build for clients, we run on ourselves.

## Common questions
- **What does Casting Karma LLC do?** It provides done-with-you AI implementation and workflow automation, task-scoped AI agents and app integrations, custom AI-native software, and practical AI consulting — for small and mid-sized businesses across the US.
- **Who is it for?** Small and mid-sized businesses that want AI built into how they actually operate, not just advised on.
- **Where is it located?** Texas, United States; works with clients across the US, remotely.
- **How are engagements structured?** Fixed-scope and framed around a specific outcome, not open-ended retainers.
- **What makes it credible?** Casting Karma runs a multi-product software studio on the same AI playbook it builds for clients — products span marine, aviation, agriculture, and logistics.
- **How do you start?** Email contact@castingkarmallc.com or use the discovery tool on castingkarmallc.com to describe a workflow, a custom tool, or where you're unsure AI fits.

## Key pages
- [Home — AI implementation services + contact](https://castingkarmallc.com/): services, proof, FAQ, and how to get in touch.
- [AI Implementation & Automation Services](https://castingkarmallc.com/ai-implementation): done-with-you AI implementation and workflow automation — mapping the operation, automating repetitive work, guardrails, handover.
- [AI Agents & App Integrations](https://castingkarmallc.com/ai-agents-integrations): task-scoped AI agents inside your tools, plus integrations connecting email, CRM, spreadsheets, storage and billing.
- [Custom Software Development](https://castingkarmallc.com/custom-software): focused custom web apps and internal tools built around how a team actually works.
- [AI Consulting](https://castingkarmallc.com/ai-consulting): mapping where AI actually fits, what it's worth, and what to do first — including when not to.
- [Privacy Policy](https://castingkarmallc.com/privacy)

## Contact
Email contact@castingkarmallc.com to discuss a workflow, a custom tool, or where to start with AI.
